channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Syria frees activist Hassan Akkad days after he was detained
item.description: His release comes after journalist Mousa al-Omar reportedly withdrew a complaint against Akkad over online criticism.

item.title: Mbappe, France play Iraq in World Cup match: prediction, team news, lineups
item.description: Star forward Kylian Mbappe and France face Iraq in Boston with Les Bleus focused on securing a place in knockout phase.

item.title: US-Iran negotiations in Switzerland kick off
item.description: US-Iran talks opened in Switzerland with mediators Qatar and Pakistan hailing a ‘historic’ opportunity for stability.

item.title: Iran-U.S. launch historic peace talks with 60-day roadmap
item.description: Iran-U.S. launch historic peace talks with 60-day roadmap

item.title: Fans flood Atlanta streets before Spain-Saudi Arabia match
item.description: Spain and Saudi Arabia fans filled the streets of Atlanta with chants and celebrations ahead of their World Cup clash.

item.title: Bolivian authorities say no active blockades after state of emergency decree
item.description: State of emergency permits deployment of military to support police amid five weeks of anti-government protests.

item.title: Gaza bids farewell to slain journalist Ahmed Wishah
item.description: Gaza bids farewell to slain journalist Ahmed Wishah.

item.title: Police charge man after suspected anti-Muslim attacks in Edinburgh
item.description: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer says 'the suspect appears to be motivated by anti-Muslim hatred'.

item.title: Is the French judiciary against Palestine?
item.description: A recent decision by a French court seems to deny the widely accepted right of occupied populations to resist.

item.title: Andy Burnham says Israel would be his first overseas visit in old clip
item.description: An old clip has resurfaced showing Andy Burnham saying Israel would be his first overseas visit if elected as UK PM.

item.title: Marc Marquez wins the Czech MotoGP, narrows title gap to leader Bezzecchi
item.description: Seven-time MotoGP world champion reduces title leader Marco Bezzecchi's points lead after the Italian was suspended.

item.title: Why Lebanon may make or break the Iran-US deal
item.description: Israeli escalation in Lebanon threatens to undermine agreement between Tehran and Washington, analysts say.

item.title: Pressure mounts on UK PM Starmer to quit after Burnham’s by-election win
item.description: UK minister says Starmer considering 'political realities' after rival Andy Burnham secured decisive by-election win.

item.title: LIVE: Spain vs Saudi Arabia – World Cup 2026
item.description: Live updates as Spain face Saudi Arabia in Group H - follow the build-up, analysis and live text commentary of the game.

item.title: Henry stars as New Zealand wrap up victory against England in second Test
item.description: New Zealand quick Matt Henry demolishes the England batting attack in the second innings to level the series.

item.title: US-Iran delegations arrive as talks begin in Switzerland
item.description: US-Iran delegations arrive as talks begin in Switzerland.

item.title: Messi, Argentina play Austria in World Cup group match: All to know
item.description: Hat-trick hero Lionel Messi back in action for Argentina as they look to take a huge step towards the knockout stages.

item.title: Ukraine strikes hit oil facilities in Crimea, Russia’s Krasnodar
item.description: Crimea's Moscow-installed leader says four people killed in drone attack on the Russian-occupied Black Sea peninsula.

item.title: ‘Kind, principled’: Colleagues remember Gaza journalist killed by Israel
item.description: Ahmed Wishah is the 12th Al Jazeera journalist killed by Israel in Gaza since October 2023.

item.title: Stop ‘Greater Israel’ to make peace
item.description: Expansionist Israel will not stop dragging the US to war in the Middle East.

item.title: Lebanon’s ancient monuments remain at risk from Israeli attack
item.description: Lebanon’s ancient monuments remain at risk from Israeli attack

item.title: Mother of Al Jazeera’s Ahmed Wishah mourns his killing
item.description: This is the moment the mother of Al Jazeera cameraman Ahmed Wishah first saw his body after Israel killed him in Gaza.

item.title: Albanian protesters rally against Kushner-backed resort in protected area
item.description: Demonstrators chant "Albania is not for sale," challenging coastal projects tied to Kushner amid environmental concerns.

item.title: Polls open in Colombia presidential race pitting leftist against hardliner
item.description: Run-off election sees leftist Ivan Cepeda and far-right lawyer Abelardo de la Espriella vying for the presidency.

item.title: Protests in Albania against Kushner resort swell to tens of thousands
item.description: Albanians have gathered for the 21st day in a row to protest plans to build a resort on Albania's coast.
